etsy_title: Notion Template Freelance Project Management Invoice Tracking Client Dashboard Productivity
etsy_description:
Stay organised and get paid on time with this all-in-one Notion template built specifically for freelancers. Manage every project, client, deadline, and invoice from a single beautiful dashboard — no more scattered spreadsheets or missed payments.

This template includes a client database, project tracker, task manager, and a fully functional invoice log with payment status tracking. Whether you're a designer, writer, developer, or consultant, this system adapts to your workflow instantly.

✅ Track project status from pitch to completion
✅ Log invoices and monitor paid vs outstanding amounts
✅ Store client contact details and project notes in one place
✅ Set deadlines and never miss a deliverable again
✅ Duplicate and reuse for every new client or project

Perfect for solo freelancers and small agencies ready to level up their business systems.

--- FAQ ---
Q: Do I need a paid Notion plan?
A: No, the free Notion plan works perfectly.
Q: How do I access the template?
A: You'll receive a PDF with a Notion link to duplicate the template instantly.
Q: Can I customise it?
A: Absolutely — every section is fully editable.
social_post: Stop losing track of client projects & unpaid invoices 📋 This Notion template gives freelancers a full project + invoice management system in one dashboard. Just duplicate & go! ✅ #NotionTemplate #FreelancerLife #ProductivityTools

etsy_title: ADHD Planner Printable Weekly PDF | Time Blocking Dopamine Rewards ADHD Friendly Planner Instant Download
etsy_description:
Finally, a weekly planner designed the way your ADHD brain actually works! This printable PDF planner combines proven time-blocking techniques with built-in dopamine reward tracking so you can stay focused, feel accomplished, and stop losing hours to decision fatigue.

What's inside:
✅ Weekly time-block schedule with visual hour slots
✅ Dopamine reward tracker to celebrate wins
✅ Brain dump worksheet to clear mental clutter
✅ Priority sorting grid (urgent vs important)
✅ Evening reset checklist for a fresh start tomorrow

Why it works for ADHD minds:
→ Large, uncluttered layout reduces overwhelm
→ Chunked time blocks prevent task paralysis
→ Reward checkboxes trigger motivation naturally
→ Flexible format fits any routine or schedule

Perfect for students, professionals, parents, and anyone managing ADHD with or without medication.

📄 FORMAT: Instant download PDF, US Letter (8.5x11), prints at home or at any print shop.

FAQ:
Q: Can I reuse these pages?
A: Yes! Print as many copies as you need for personal use.
Q: Is this editable?
A: These are print-ready PDFs, not fillable forms.
Q: What if I need help?
A: Message me anytime — I respond within 24 hours.
social_post: Tired of planners that don't fit your ADHD brain? 🧠 This printable PDF uses time-blocking + dopamine rewards to make planning feel GOOD. Instant download ⬇️ #ADHDPlanner #TimeBlocking #ADHDProductivity #PrintablePlanner
